name: PARennial Golf - Lincoln Park
about: PARennial Golf offers a premium indoor golf experience centered around state-of-the-art Trackman technology. The venue features multiple simulator bays across three Chicago locations, providing a golf experience second only to being on the course itself. Facilities are designed with a high-end, modern aesthetic and emphasize 24/7 accessibility for members. The membership model is central to the operation, offering flexible booking options, walk-in access, and packages that include free booking hours. Pricing and services are structured to appeal to both serious golfers looking for practice and casual players seeking a premium social experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Real-time simulator bay availability and walk-in play through the mobile app
Premium Trackman technology for accurate shot data and course simulation
Flexible membership model with 24/7 access and included booking hours
Multiple PGA-certified instructors available for personalized coaching
Ability to play on world-renowned virtual golf courses

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service; BYOB may be allowed but unclear.
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch technology; primary simulator hardware used.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is standard practice to bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue's policy on outside food and drink is not explicitly mentioned on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes depends on the simulator and the number of people sharing the bay. Typically, it can range from 2 to 4 hours.

faq.question: Is PARennial Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendly features or policies.
